arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka and Arsenal told Thomas Tuchel World Cup truth England boss probably already knew
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Gunners could provide the England manager with a key contingent for the tournament in the States, Canada and Mexico next year

arts.ttl: Arsenal braced for Gyokeres transfer 'auction' as Real Madrid dealt injury blow
arts.sum: Arsenal will have one eye on their huge Champions League second-leg clash against Real Madrid - despite facing Brentford next. Isaac Seelochan of football.london says: "Gyokeres was never going to come cheap so these reports shouldn't be too much of a surprise to the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta faces transfer stumbling block as Gunners agree five deals
arts.sum: Arsenal have some difficult decisions to ponder after defeating Real Madrid while Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has received some mixed news ahead of the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitike sends Arsenal and Chelsea clear transfer message with Premier League statement
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea transfer target Hugo Ekitike showed exactly what he could do on the big stage on Thursday night with a superb goal against Tottenham Hotspur. Arsenal are expected to finally give Mikel Arteta a new centre-forward at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer loved what Arsenal supporters did vs Real Madrid in stunning win
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has heaped praise on Arsenal after their dominant 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the Champions League on Tuesday night . And former Newcastle United striker Shearer has now offered his view on Arsenal's fantastic victory over Real, paying special credit to the atmosphere at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Joe Hart says player Arsenal in talks to sign looked 'so dangerous' in 1-1 Europa League draw against Tottenham

arts.ttl: Edu pens heartfelt message to Arsenal fans after officially leaving sporting director role... as the Brazilian sends 'warmest wishes' to new Gunners chief Andrea Berta
arts.sum: The Brazilian left his role as sporting director in November after five-and-a-half years, having previously been part of the famous 'Invincibles' squad as a player
